julesThoughtProcess: The image is incredibly dark, almost pure black. To embrace this, I am creating a story centered around stealth, the void, and shadowy cyber-espionage. The color #00ffff will provide a striking contrast.
storyPanel: Subject emerged from the deep void of Sector 7. Scanners detected minimal light reflection, suggesting an advanced light-bending cloak or perhaps a complete disconnect from the visual grid. A silent operative in the neon night.
